intro.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
intro.text: Good morning! Oh, you are awake! I am Oma Irmtrout.

intro_2.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
intro_2.text: Welcome to my house. You are in Voegelsen now. A small village, but very nice!

breakfast_problem.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
breakfast_problem.text: I want to make breakfast, but I have a problem...

ask_help.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
ask_help.text: I need bread, eggs, and milk. Can you help me?

explain_where.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
explain_where.text: Go to Tante Enso. It is the small shop on the main street. Enzo works there. He is very friendly!

ask_help_again.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
ask_help_again.text: So, will you get the bread, eggs, and milk for me?

decline_response.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
decline_response.text: Okay. Come back when you are ready. I will be here!

accept_quest.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
accept_quest.text: Wonderful! You are so kind. Remember: bread, eggs, and milk.

food_quiz_intro.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
food_quiz_intro.text: But first, let me check... do you know these words in English?

quiz_pass.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
quiz_pass.text: Very good! You know the words. Now go to Tante Enso and get our breakfast!

quiz_fail.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
quiz_fail.text: Hmm, that is okay. Practice makes perfect! Try to remember: bread, eggs, and milk. Now go to Tante Enso!

remind_player.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
remind_player.text: Did you find the things? Go to Tante Enso on the main street. I need bread, eggs, and milk!

has_items.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
has_items.text: Oh, you have everything! Bread, eggs, and milk. Perfect!

complete_quest.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
complete_quest.text: Thank you so much! Breakfast is ready soon. You are a good helper!

vocabCards.definition_en: a food made from flour and water
oval objects laid by birds, eaten as food

vocabCards.example_en: Do you want milk in your coffee?

quest_done_greeting.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
quest_done_greeting.text: Breakfast is ready! Come, sit down. You are always welcome here.

quest_done_hint.speaker: Oma Irmtrout
quest_done_hint.text: Maybe you should visit more people in the village. Everyone is very friendly!

intro.speaker: Enzo
intro.text: Hello! Welcome to Tante Enso. I am Enzo. We have food, drinks, and many things here!

intro_choice.speaker: Enzo
intro_choice.text: Can I help you find something?

just_looking.speaker: Enzo
just_looking.text: No problem! Take your time. Come back if you need help.

what_we_sell.speaker: Enzo
what_we_sell.text: We have bread, milk, eggs, cheese, butter, juice... everything you need!

oma_quest_greeting.speaker: Enzo
oma_quest_greeting.text: Ah, you come from Oma Irmtrout? She is so nice! She needs bread, eggs, and milk, yes?

oma_quest_choice.speaker: Enzo
oma_quest_choice.text: I can get everything for you. But first, can you tell me the English words?

encourage.speaker: Enzo
encourage.text: Don't worry! It is easy. Just try your best!

shopping_quiz_intro.speaker: Enzo
shopping_quiz_intro.text: Okay, let's see if you know your food words!

shopping_quiz.speaker: Enzo
shopping_quiz.text: Name these food items in English!

quiz_pass.speaker: Enzo
quiz_pass.text: Excellent! You know the words very well. Here are your items: bread, eggs, and milk!

quiz_fail.speaker: Enzo
quiz_fail.text: Good try! You need more practice, but here are the items anyway. Bread, eggs, and milk!

give_items.speaker: Enzo
give_items.text: Take them to Oma Irmtrout. She will be happy! And come back any time.

give_items_reward.speaker: Enzo
give_items_reward.text: Here you go! Tell Oma I say hello!

vocabCards.definition_en: a place where you buy things
vocabCards.example_en: I go to the shop every day.
Do you like cheese on your bread?

vocabCards.definition_en: a soft yellow food made from cream
vocabCards.example_en: Put some butter on the bread.
I drink orange juice in the morning.

quest_active_reminder.speaker: Enzo
quest_active_reminder.text: Still shopping? Take your time! Remember: bread, eggs, and milk for Oma Irmtrout.

already_done.speaker: Enzo
already_done.text: Hello again! Tante Enso is always open. Do you need anything else?

already_done_choice.speaker: Enzo
already_done_choice.text: We have fresh food every day!

intro.speaker: Rosa
intro.text: Ciao! Welcome to Eiscafe La Rosa! I am Rosa. Would you like some ice cream?

offer_quest.speaker: Rosa
offer_quest.text: But you must order in English! Can you do that?

start_quiz.speaker: Rosa
start_quiz.text: Tell me the English words for these ice cream flavors!

quiz_pass.speaker: Rosa
quiz_pass.text: Perfetto! You know your flavors! Here are two scoops for you!

quiz_fail.speaker: Rosa
quiz_fail.text: Not bad! Here is one scoop for trying. Come back and practice more!

vocabCards.definition_en: a sweet brown food or flavor
a sweet flavor from a tropical plant

maybe_later.speaker: Rosa
maybe_later.text: No problem! The ice cream is always here. Come back!

reminder.speaker: Rosa
reminder.text: Ready to order? Tell me the flavors in English!

quest_done.speaker: Rosa
quest_done.text: Hello again! The best ice cream in Voegelsen, no? Come back any time!

intro.speaker: Mehmet
intro.text: Hey! Welcome to Columbus Doener! Best kebab in the village!

offer_quest.speaker: Mehmet
offer_quest.text: Are you hungry? You can order, but try in English! Deal?

start_quiz.speaker: Mehmet
start_quiz.text: Okay! Let's see if you can order food in English!

quiz_pass.speaker: Mehmet
quiz_pass.text: Great job! You ordered perfectly! Here is your doener, and something extra...

quiz_fail.speaker: Mehmet
quiz_fail.text: Not perfect, but I understand you! Here is your doener. Practice more!

reward.speaker: Mehmet
reward.text: Enjoy! The Doener Buff will make you stronger for a while!

vocabCards.definition_en: a polite word when asking for something
a polite word after receiving something

maybe_later.speaker: Mehmet
maybe_later.text: No problem, friend! Come back when you are hungry!

reminder.speaker: Mehmet
reminder.text: Ready to order? Remember, in English!

quest_done.speaker: Mehmet
quest_done.text: Hey, my friend! How was the doener? The best, yes? Come back any time!

intro.speaker: Klaus
intro.text: Good day. I am Klaus, from the Star Administration office. How can I help you?

offer_quest.speaker: Klaus
offer_quest.text: We have an English travel form. Would you like to fill it out? You need it to travel.

choices.text: Yes, I need a travel permit.

start_quiz.speaker: Klaus
start_quiz.text: Please answer these questions carefully. Use correct English.

quiz_pass.speaker: Klaus
quiz_pass.text: Very good. Your form is correct. Here is your Travel Permit.

quiz_fail.speaker: Klaus
quiz_fail.text: I am sorry, there are mistakes. Please study more and come back.

reward.speaker: Klaus
reward.text: Your permit is ready. You may now travel beyond Voegelsen. Good luck.

vocabCards.example_en: My date of birth is January first.

maybe_later.speaker: Klaus
maybe_later.text: Very well. The office is open when you need it.

reminder.speaker: Klaus
reminder.text: Are you ready to fill out the form now? It must be in English.

quest_done.speaker: Klaus
quest_done.text: Good day. Your papers are all in order. Safe travels.

intro.speaker: Borla
intro.text: Hello! Welcome to LaBorla. We have clothes, shoes, and more. Can I help you?

offer_quest.speaker: Borla
offer_quest.text: Would you like to practice shopping in English?

start_quiz.speaker: Borla
start_quiz.text: How do you say these shopping phrases in English?

quiz_pass.speaker: Borla
quiz_pass.text: Wonderful! You are a great shopper!

quiz_fail.speaker: Borla
quiz_fail.text: Good try! Come back and practice more.

vocabCards.definition_en: how big or small something is

maybe_later.speaker: Borla
maybe_later.text: No problem! Come back when you want to shop!

reminder.speaker: Borla
reminder.text: Ready to finish our shopping practice?

quest_done.speaker: Borla
quest_done.text: Hello again! Nice to see you. LaBorla is always open!

intro.speaker: Finn
intro.text: Hey there! I am Finn, from the Jugendfeuerwehr. Have you seen the noticeboard?

offer_quest.speaker: Finn
offer_quest.text: There is an English notice on the board. Can you read it for me?

start_quiz.speaker: Finn
start_quiz.text: Read the notice and answer these questions.

quiz_pass.speaker: Finn
quiz_pass.text: You understood everything! Great reading skills!

quiz_fail.speaker: Finn
quiz_fail.text: Some parts were hard, right? Keep practicing your reading!

reward.speaker: Finn
reward.text: Thanks for helping! The community appreciates it!

vocabCards.example_en: The meeting is at six o'clock.
We need a volunteer for Saturday.

maybe_later.speaker: Finn
maybe_later.text: No worries! The notice is not going anywhere.

reminder.speaker: Finn
reminder.text: Did you finish reading the English notice? Come try!

quest_done.speaker: Finn
quest_done.text: Hey! Thanks again for reading that notice. You are really helpful!

intro.speaker: Frau Mering
intro.text: Good day! I am Frau Mering. This is my holiday home, FEWO Mering. Very cozy!

offer_quest.speaker: Frau Mering
offer_quest.text: Would you like to book a room? You must ask in English!

choices.text: Yes, I need a place to rest.

start_quiz.speaker: Frau Mering
start_quiz.text: Let me ask you some booking questions. Answer in English!

quiz_pass.speaker: Frau Mering
quiz_pass.text: Perfect! Your room is ready. You can rest here any time now!

quiz_fail.speaker: Frau Mering
quiz_fail.text: Hmm, there were some problems. But I understand you! The room is yours.

reward.speaker: Frau Mering
reward.text: Welcome! FEWO Mering is now your save point. Come here to rest!

vocabCards.definition_en: a part of a building with walls
vocabCards.example_en: I would like a room for one night.

vocabCards.definition_en: a small metal object to open a door

vocabCards.example_en: I want to book a room, please.

maybe_later.speaker: Frau Mering
maybe_later.text: Of course! Come back when you need a place to rest.

reminder.speaker: Frau Mering
reminder.text: Ready to finish your booking? Let me ask you the questions!

quest_done.speaker: Frau Mering
quest_done.text: Welcome back! Your room is always ready for you. Please, rest!

intro.speaker: Max
intro.text: Hi! I am Max! Do you want to play? The playground is so much fun!

offer_quest.speaker: Max
offer_quest.text: But first, can you introduce yourself? In English!

start_quiz.speaker: Max
start_quiz.text: Let's practice saying hello and making friends!

quiz_pass.speaker: Max
quiz_pass.text: Yay! Now we are friends! That was great!

quiz_fail.speaker: Max
quiz_fail.text: That is okay! We are friends anyway! Practice more, okay?

vocabCards.definition_en: a greeting when you meet someone
a person you like and trust

maybe_later.speaker: Max
maybe_later.text: Okay! I will be here! Come back and play!

quest_done.speaker: Max
quest_done.text: Hey, friend! Want to play on the swings?

intro.speaker: Nicole
intro.text: Hello. I am Nicole, a speech therapist. I help people speak clearly.

offer_quest.speaker: Nicole
offer_quest.text: English pronunciation can be hard. Would you like to practice some sounds?

start_quiz.speaker: Nicole
start_quiz.text: Listen carefully. Which word has the correct 'th' sound?

quiz_pass.speaker: Nicole
quiz_pass.text: Excellent! You have a very clear voice. Keep practicing!

quiz_fail.speaker: Nicole
quiz_fail.text: Pronunciation takes time. You did well! The Clear Voice buff will help you remember.

reward.speaker: Nicole
reward.text: Here is the Clear Voice buff. Your words will be clearer now!

vocabCards.definition_en: the state of the sky and air

vocabCards.example_en: Come with me to the park.

maybe_later.speaker: Nicole
maybe_later.text: No problem. Good pronunciation is important. Come back when you are ready.

reminder.speaker: Nicole
reminder.text: Ready to continue our pronunciation practice?

quest_done.speaker: Nicole
quest_done.text: Your pronunciation is getting better every day! Keep up the good work.

intro.speaker: Lea
intro.text: Hi there! Welcome to the hair salon! I am Lea. Want a new look?

offer_quest.speaker: Lea
offer_quest.text: You need to describe the haircut you want. In English! Can you do it?

choices.text: Yes, I know what I want!

quiz_pass.speaker: Lea
quiz_pass.text: Great description! I know exactly what you want. Here you go!

quiz_fail.speaker: Lea
quiz_fail.text: Hmm, I think I understand. Let me try! Not bad for your first time!

reward.speaker: Lea
reward.text: Looking good! Enjoy your new haircut!

maybe_later.speaker: Lea
maybe_later.text: Sure! Come back when you want a fresh look!

reminder.speaker: Lea
reminder.text: Ready for your haircut? Tell me what you want in English!

quest_done.speaker: Lea
quest_done.text: Hey! Looking great! Come back any time for a new style!

intro.speaker: Werner
intro.text: Morning! I am Werner. This is my kiosk. Newspapers, snacks, and coffee!

offer_quest.speaker: Werner
offer_quest.text: There is an English newspaper today. Can you read the headline for me?

start_quiz.speaker: Werner
start_quiz.text: Read this headline and answer the questions.

quiz_pass.speaker: Werner
quiz_pass.text: You got it! Good reading! Here, have a free coffee.

quiz_fail.speaker: Werner
quiz_fail.text: Not bad! Reading gets easier with practice. Have a coffee anyway!

reward.speaker: Werner
reward.text: Come back tomorrow for the next headline!

vocabCards.example_en: I read the newspaper every morning.

vocabCards.definition_en: the title of a news story

maybe_later.speaker: Werner
maybe_later.text: Sure! The paper is here all day. Come back!

reminder.speaker: Werner
reminder.text: Ready to try the headline? Come on, give it a read!

quest_done.speaker: Werner
quest_done.text: Hey! Want another newspaper? Come back tomorrow!
